groups.identificationDesc: Unique identifiers for the creature in the world
groups.localesDesc: Translated names and titles per language (creature_template_locale table)
groups.combatParamsDesc: Damage, attack speed and combat behavior
groups.aurasAndImmunitiesDesc: Auras, Resistances and spell school immunities
groups.spawnsDesc: All spawn instances of this creature in the world (creature table)
groups.creatureSpellsDesc: Spells usable by the creature AI or by the player controlling the creature (creature_template_spell table, max 8)
groups.creatureTextDesc: Dialogue and text spoken by the creature (creature_text table)
groups.creatureTextLocaleDesc: Creature text translations per language (creature_text_locale table)

tooltips.guid: A unique identifier given to each creature to distinguish one creature from another. Two creatures can NOT have same GUID.
tooltips.id: The entry of the template that is used when instantiating this creature.
tooltips.map: The Map ID of the position of the creature.
tooltips.zoneId: Calculated by the core if Calculate.Creature.Zone.Area.Data is enabled.
tooltips.areaId: Calculated by the core if Calculate.Creature.Zone.Area.Data is enabled.
tooltips.spawnMask: Controls under which difficulties the creature is spawned.
tooltips.phaseMask: This is a bitmask field that describes all the phases that a creature will appear in.
tooltips.modelid: The model ID associated with this creature. Note that two creatures that use the same template can have different models.
tooltips.equipment_id: The ID as defined within creature_equip_template corresponding to the CreatureID.
tooltips.position_x: The X position of the creature.
tooltips.position_y: The Y position of the creature.
tooltips.position_z: The Z position of the creature.
tooltips.orientation: The orientation of the creature. (North = 0.0; South = pi (3.14159))
tooltips.spawntimesecs: The respawn time of the creature in seconds.
tooltips.wander_distance: The maximum distance that the creature should spawn from its spawn point. Also controls how far away the creature can walk from its spawn point if its MovementType = 1.
tooltips.currentwaypoint: The current waypoint number that the creature is on, if any.
tooltips.curhealth: The current health that the creature has. This column is used only if RegenHealth is disabled.
tooltips.curmana: The current mana that the creature has.
tooltips.MovementType: The movement type associated with this creature. Usually the same as creature_template.MovementType but can be different.
tooltips.npcflag: Same as creature_template.npcflag. Note: A creature.npcflag record will override a creature_template.npcflag record.
tooltips.unit_flags: Same as creature_template.unit_flags. Note: A creature.unit_flags record will override a creature_template.unit_flags record.
tooltips.dynamicflags: Same as creature_template.dynamicflags. Note: A creature.dynamicflags record will override a creature_template.dynamicflags record.
tooltips.ScriptName: The ScriptName for when scripting it in the core. This might also be 'SmartTrigger'. It will than use SmartAI.
tooltips.VerifiedBuild: This field is used by the TrinityDB Team to determine whether a template has been verified from WDB files.

tooltips.guid: A unique identifier given to each creature to distinguish one creature from another.
tooltips.id: The entry of the template that is used when instantiating this creature.
tooltips.map: The Map ID of the position of the creature.
tooltips.zoneId: Zone Identifier, calculated by the core.
tooltips.areaId: Area Identifier, calculated by the core.
tooltips.spawnMask: Controls under which difficulties the creature is spawned.
tooltips.phaseMask: Bitmask describing all the phases that a creature will appear in.
tooltips.modelid: The model ID associated with this creature. Uses random model from template if 0.
tooltips.equipment_id: The equipment set ID. -1 for random, 0 for none.
tooltips.position_x: The X position of the creature.
tooltips.position_y: The Y position of the creature.
tooltips.position_z: The Z position of the creature.
tooltips.orientation: The orientation of the creature. (North = 0.0; South = pi (3.14159))
tooltips.spawntimesecs: The respawn time of the creature in seconds.
tooltips.wander_distance: The maximum distance that the creature should spawn/wander from its spawn point.
tooltips.currentwaypoint: The current waypoint number that the creature is on.
tooltips.curhealth: The current health of the creature. Used only if RegenHealth is disabled.
tooltips.curmana: The current mana that the creature has.
tooltips.MovementType: The movement type associated with this creature. Overrides template if set.
tooltips.npcflag: NPC flags. Overrides template if set.
tooltips.unit_flags: Unit flags. Overrides template if set.
tooltips.dynamicflags: Dynamic flags. Overrides template if set.
tooltips.ScriptName: The ScriptName for when scripting it in the core.

groups.animationDesc: Animation settings specific to this spawn (creature_addon table)
groups.creatureAddonDesc: Mount settings specific to this spawn (creature_addon table)
groups.creatureTextDesc: Dialogues and texts displayed by the creature (table creature_text)
groups.currentStateDesc: Current health and mana of the spawn
groups.flagsDesc: NPC, unit and dynamic flags for this spawn
groups.movementOverrideDesc: Movement capabilities specific to this spawn (creature_movement_override table)
groups.spawnSettingsDesc: Spawn mask, phase, model and equipment

creature_classlevelstats.title: Class Level Stats
creature_classlevelstats.description: Base health, mana, armor and damage stats per creature class and level
creature_classlevelstats.searchPlaceholder: Filter by level (number) or class name…
Filter by level (number) or class name…

tooltips.basehp0: Base HP when creature_template.exp = 0 (Vanilla). Multiplied by HealthModifier.
tooltips.basehp1: Base HP when creature_template.exp = 1 (TBC). Multiplied by HealthModifier.
tooltips.basehp2: Base HP when creature_template.exp = 2 (WotLK). Multiplied by HealthModifier.
tooltips.damage_base: Base damage when exp = 0 (Vanilla). Multiplied by DamageModifier.
tooltips.damage_exp1: Base damage when exp = 1 (TBC). Multiplied by DamageModifier.
tooltips.damage_exp2: Base damage when exp = 2 (WotLK). Multiplied by DamageModifier.

groups.healthDesc: Base HP per expansion tier (multiplied by creature_template.HealthModifier)
groups.attackDesc: Melee and ranged attack power bonus added to base damage
groups.damageDesc: Base damage per expansion tier (multiplied by creature_template.DamageModifier)
